The '''Light Spirit''' was the spirit of light who was worshipped by the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]].

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Rampage of the Phlogs}} {{1stm}}
*{{Ewoks|The Travelling Jindas}} {{Mo}}
*{{Ewoks|The Wish Plant}} {{Mo}}
*{{Ewoks|The Totem Master}} {{Mo}}
